notes: Unresolvable district scopes (no queryable official boundary): PUDDST. Contests/measures scoped to them are hidden rather than shown to the wrong voters.

measures.jurisdiction: Klickitat County Fire Protection District No. 4 (Lyle)
measures.title: Fire Protection and Emergency Medical Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Sets the fire and EMS levy for 2026 with CPI adjustments for nine years (Resolution 2026-04).

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
